synopsis:
Issue 8 of 8 of the Dark Horse Comics The High Republic Adventures (2022) Series
The Jedi Order tries desperately to bring peace to the streets of the Holy City as the Battle of Jedha nears its climax. Meanwhile, Sav Malagan tries to keep Maz Kanatas crew together long enough to rescue their captain from the clutches of Arkik Von.
Padawan and pirates, working together.
May the Force be with us all.
title: The High Republic Adventures (2022) #08
